nodes.title: Load Warehouses, Stations, Types
nodes.description: On page enter and after each successful mutation, call Promise.allSettled([api.getWarehouses(bizId), api.getStations(bizId), api.getWarehouseTypes(bizId)]). Success: set warehouses/stations/warehouseTypes from fulfilled responses, missing responses become empty arrays.

nodes.title: Compute Warehouse Summary
nodes.description: After loading, derive mainCount, stationCount, subCount and dynamic subTypeFilters data from warehouses and warehouseTypes. Used to render summary cards and chips.

nodes.title: Update Warehouse Filters
nodes.description: When user clicks main/station/sub filters or subtype chips, update filterType and filterSubType signals. filteredWarehouses() recomputes immediately and updates visible card list.

nodes.title: Open Warehouse Form
nodes.description: On add/edit clicks, open warehouse modal. Add mode resets name/fields and default type main; edit mode pre-fills all fields including location, station, notes.

nodes.title: Validate Warehouse Form
nodes.description: Before save, validate required name not empty. Failure: show toast error and block save. Success: continue to API save.

nodes.title: Persist Warehouse
nodes.description: After validation, call api.updateWarehouse(id, payload) for edit mode or api.createWarehouse(bizId, payload) for add mode. Success: close form, toast success, reload all data. Failure: show error toast and keep form open.

nodes.title: Remove Warehouse With Confirm
nodes.description: When user clicks delete on a warehouse card, open confirm dialog via toast.confirm and only if confirmed call api.deleteWarehouse(id). Success: toast success and reload. Failure: show error toast and keep state as is.

nodes.title: Open Warehouse Type Form
nodes.description: When managing types, open form modal. Add mode resets form; edit mode fills name, subTypeKey, description, icon and color.

nodes.title: Validate Type Form
nodes.description: Before saving type, require name and subTypeKey; otherwise show error toast and prevent submit.

nodes.title: Persist Warehouse Type
nodes.description: After validation, call api.updateWarehouseType(id, payload) in edit mode or api.createWarehouseType(bizId, payload) in add mode. Success: close modal and reload all reference data. Failure: error toast and keep modal open.

nodes.title: Remove Warehouse Type With Confirm
nodes.description: On delete type action, run toast.confirm with warning. On confirmation call api.deleteWarehouseType(id). Success: toast success and reload all data; failure: show error toast.
